metadata.description: PM expertise as AI skills. 1 core knowledge base, 16 commands, and frameworks from 15+ books for product managers who ship substance, not theater.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Product management skills for Claude Code. 16 commands: /teach-pm, /setup, /discover, /position, /strategy, /prioritise, /stakeholders, /brief, /spec, /metrics, /stories, /review, /decide, /translate, /audit, /retro. Framework-backed, anti-theater, opinionated.
